strategy: 8x group unroll + packed uint32 loads, no s_prefetch
revert_reason: Median 93.2 tok/s vs baseline 93.1: delta +0.1%, within noise. gfx1201 at GDDR6 bandwidth ceiling with base 4x unroll; 8x unroll adds no measurable ILP gain.
root_cause: Memory-bandwidth-bound kernel at GDDR6 ceiling. Higher unroll increases VGPR pressure without improving BW throughput.
next_recommended_reason: 12% decode cycles, arithmetic component (attention scores) may benefit from RDNA4 tuning unlike pure-BW GEMV kernels
